detaileddescription.para: This does the iteration, using the specified method. First try gsl_multiroot_fsolver_hybrids If that doesn't work try gsl_multiroot_fsolver_dnewton Returns the gsl status.

memberdef.argsstring: (boost::numeric::ublas::matrix< value_type_ > &U, const vector< value_type_ > &eliminatedTotal, vector< value_type_ > &yi)
memberdef.name: fitConservationRules

detaileddescription.para: This does the actual work of generating random numbers and making sure they fit.
Generates a new set of values for the S vector that is a) random and b) obeys the conservation rules.
The settle function computes the steady state nearest the initial conditions.

inbodydescription.para: These are the fields of the SteadyState class
